name: nose2
description: Successor to the nose testing framework, extending the standard library unittest with plugins, better discovery and parameterized tests.

seo.title: nose2 — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: nose2: Successor to the nose testing framework, extending the standard library unittest with plugins, better discovery and parameterized tests.

when_to_use: Extend Python unittest with test discovery plugins
Parameterized Python tests with test generators
Custom test plugins via nose2 plugin architecture
Unified test runner for legacy unittest and pytest suites

pros: Drop-in successor to legacy nose framework
cons: Community has largely moved to pytest
Limited learning resources compared to pytest
review.verdict: A reasonable nose migration path, but most Python teams should skip it and adopt pytest directly.
review.best_for: Teams maintaining legacy nose test suites who need incremental migration
review.not_for: New Python projects where pytest offers more plugins and momentum
